---
title: "4_PrepModelData"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(car)
library(parallel)
library(patchwork)
library(glmmTMB)

options(na.action = "na.fail")

readRDS("data/demog/vr_modData/mod_data.rds") %>% list2env(.GlobalEnv)

## See what variables were and were not included in mt only models, to reduce variable set if possible
clim.mods <- readRDS("r/modelFitResults/best_climOnly_mods_2026-04-15.RDS")
summary(clim.mods$surv_climOnly_best_mod) # gs mean T, gs mean T range, gs snow days, win mean T
summary(clim.mods$growth_climOnly_best_mod) # gs mean T, gs mean T range, win mean T, win mean T range
summary(clim.mods$growth_var_climOnly_best_mod) # gs mean T range, win mean T range
summary(clim.mods$repro_climOnly_best_mod) # win mean T, win mean T range, gs mean T, gs mean T range
summary(clim.mods$nflrs_climOnly_best_mod) # gs mean T, gs mean T range, gs snow days, win mean T range
# annual snow days not in any stand-alone climate model so can exclude here

clim <- read_csv("data/climate/for_analyses/clim_summary.csv")
clim_vars <- names(clim)[!names(clim) %in% c("site", "pop", "year","ann_snow_days")]

microtopo <- read_csv("data/output/model_microtopo_25cm.csv")
mt_vars <- names(microtopo)[!names(microtopo) %in% c("site", "pop", "plantID","elv_pt")]
table(repro_mod_data$pop,repro_mod_data$aspect.cat)

surv_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(surv_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
growth_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(growth_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
repro_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(repro_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")
nflrs_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat <- relevel(as.factor(nflrs_mod_data_scaled$aspect.cat), ref = "top")

surv_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(surv_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
growth_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(growth_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
repro_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(repro_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
nflrs_mod_data_scaled$site <- relevel(as.factor(nflrs_mod_data_scaled$site), ref = "niwot")
```

# --------------
# Fit and dredge global models

```{r vr_global_models}
surv_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("surv ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
surv_clim_mod <- glmer(formula = surv_clim_formula, family = "binomial", data = surv_mod_data_scaled,nAGQ=0)
summary(surv_clim_mod)

growth_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_clim_mod <- lmer(formula = growth_clim_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = F)

repro_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("flowered ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
repro_clim_mod <- glmer(repro_clim_formula, data = repro_mod_data_scaled, family = binomial, nAGQ=0)

nflrs_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("total_flrs ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + site*aspect.cat + (1|site.pop) + (1|obs_id)"), collapse = " "))
nflrs_clim_mod <- glmer(nflrs_clim_formula, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, family = poisson, nAGQ=0)
```

```{r clim_dredge}
# Note: must not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")

dredge_surv_clim <- dredge(surv_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
  subset = (win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3)

dredge_growth_clim <- dredge(growth_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
  subset = (+ win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3)

dredge_repro_clim <- dredge(repro_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
  subset = (+ win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3)

dredge_nflrs_clim <- dredge(nflrs_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
    subset = (+ win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3)

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r clim_model_selection}
surv_clim_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_surv_clim, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
growth_clim_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_clim, subset = 1)[[1]]
repro_clim_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_repro_clim, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
nflrs_clim_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_nflrs_clim, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
performance::r2(nflrs_clim_best_mod)
```

```{r growth_var_clim_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq = residuals(growth_clim_best_mod)^2)
growth_var_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth_resid.sq ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + aspect.cat + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_var_clim_mod <- lmer(growth_var_clim_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE, na.action = na.fail)

clust <- makeCluster(32, type = "FORK")
dredge_growth_var_clim <- dredge(growth_var_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
  subset = (+ win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3)

stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_clim_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_clim, subset = 1)[[1]]
growth_var_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(growth_var_clim_best_mod)$coefficients), c("log_size_t0", "year2024", "year2025", "(Intercept)"))
```

# save best clim models
```{r save_clim_models}

formula(surv_clim_best_mod)
formula(growth_clim_best_mod)
formula(repro_clim_best_mod)
formula(nflrs_clim_best_mod)
formula(growth_var_clim_best_mod)

surv_clim_vars <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(surv_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)
growth_clim_vars <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(growth_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)
repro_clim_vars <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(repro_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)
nflrs_clim_vars <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(nflrs_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)
growth_var_clim_vars <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(growth_var_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)

clim_mods <- list(surv_clim_best_mod = surv_clim_best_mod,
                  growth_clim_best_mod = growth_clim_best_mod,
                  repro_clim_best_mod = repro_clim_best_mod,
                  nflrs_clim_best_mod = nflrs_clim_best_mod,
                  growth_var_clim_best_mod = growth_var_clim_best_mod,
                  growth_var_mod_data_scaled = growth_var_mod_data_scaled)

saveRDS(clim_mods,paste0("r/modelFitResults/best_clim_mods_",Sys.Date(),".RDS"))
```

# --------------
# Microtopo variable winnowing: univariate R², correlation + VIF
# --------------

```{r mt_global_models}
clim_corr_df <- clim %>% 
  select(all_of(clim_vars))

corrplot::corrplot(cor(clim_corr_df),method="number")

# survival
survival_base <- update(surv_clim_best_mod,nAGQ=0)
base_AICc <- AICc(survival_base) %>% round(.,2)        
for(mt_var in mt_vars){
  mod_new <- update( survival_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", mt_var)))
  new_AICc <- AICc(mod_new) %>% round(.,2)                  
  cat(paste(c(mt_var,"new:",new_AICc,"base:",base_AICc,"\n")))
  cat(new_AICc - base_AICc,"\n")
}

# growth
growth_base <- growth_clim_best_mod
base_AICc <- AICc(growth_base) %>% round(.,2)        
for(mt_var in mt_vars){
  mod_new <- update(growth_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", mt_var)))
  new_AICc <- AICc(mod_new) %>% round(.,2)                  
  cat(paste(c(mt_var,"new:",new_AICc,"base:",base_AICc,"\n")))
  cat(new_AICc - base_AICc,"\n")
}

# nflr
nflr_base <- update(nflrs_clim_best_mod,nAGQ=0)
base_AICc <- AICc(nflr_base) %>% round(.,2)        
for(mt_var in mt_vars){
  mod_new <- update(nflr_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", mt_var)))
  new_AICc <- AICc(mod_new) %>% round(.,2)                  
  cat(paste(c(mt_var,"new:",new_AICc,"base:",base_AICc,"\n")))
  cat(new_AICc - base_AICc,"\n")
}

# repro
repro_base <- update(repro_clim_best_mod,nAGQ=0)
base_AICc <- AICc(repro_base) %>% round(.,2)        
for(mt_var in mt_vars){
  mod_new <- update(repro_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", mt_var)))
  new_AICc <- AICc(mod_new) %>% round(.,2)                  
  cat(paste(c(mt_var,"new:",new_AICc,"base:",base_AICc,"\n")))
  cat(new_AICc - base_AICc,"\n")
}

# in order
surv_mt_vars <- c("nrt_25","tpi_25")
growth_mt_vars <- c("nrt_25", "prcv_25")
nflrs_mt_vars <- c("tpi_25", "tri_25")
repro_mt_vars <- c("tri_25","tpi_25") # both increased AIC but less than others and by sml amount
```

```{r mt_global_models}

surv_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "surv ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat +",
  paste(c(surv_clim_vars, surv_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(surv_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(surv_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
surv_mt_mod <- glmer(surv_mt_formula, family = binomial, data = surv_mod_data_scaled, nAGQ = 0)
formula(surv_mt_mod)
length(attr(terms(surv_mt_mod), "term.labels"))

growth_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "growth ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat +",
  paste(c(growth_clim_vars, growth_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(growth_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(growth_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
growth_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_mt_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE)
formula(growth_mt_mod)
length(attr(terms(growth_mt_mod), "term.labels"))

repro_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "flowered ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(repro_clim_vars, repro_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(repro_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(repro_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
repro_mt_mod <- glmer(repro_mt_formula, family = binomial, data = repro_mod_data_scaled, nAGQ = 0)
formula(repro_mt_formula)
length(attr(terms(repro_mt_mod), "term.labels"))

nflrs_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "total_flrs ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(nflrs_clim_vars, nflrs_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(nflrs_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(nflrs_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop) + (1|obs_id)"
))
nflrs_mt_formula
nflrs_mt_mod <- glmer(nflrs_mt_formula, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, family = poisson, nAGQ=0)
formula(nflrs_mt_formula)
length(attr(terms(nflrs_mt_mod), "term.labels"))
```

```{r mt_dredge}
# Note: do not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")

dredge_surv_mt <- dredge(surv_mt_mod, cluster = clust, 
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", surv_clim_vars), trace = 2)

dredge_growth_mt <- dredge(growth_mt_mod, cluster = clust, 
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", growth_clim_vars), trace = 2)

dredge_repro_mt <- dredge(repro_mt_mod, cluster = clust, 
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", repro_clim_vars), trace = 2)

dredge_nflrs_mt <- dredge(nflrs_mt_mod, cluster = clust, 
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", nflrs_clim_vars), trace = 2)

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r mt_model_selection}
surv_mt_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_surv_mt, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
growth_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_mt, subset = 1)[[1]]
repro_mt_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_repro_mt, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
nflrs_mt_best_mod <- update(get.models(dredge_nflrs_mt, subset = 1)[[1]], nAGQ = 1)
performance::r2(nflrs_mt_best_mod)
```

```{r growth_var_mt_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq.mt = residuals(growth_mt_best_mod)^2)

summary(lm(growth_resid.sq.mt ~ nrt_25,data=growth_var_mod_data_scaled))$r.squared
summary(lm(growth_resid.sq.mt ~ est_25,data=growth_var_mod_data_scaled))$r.squared
summary(lm(growth_resid.sq.mt ~ tpi_25,data=growth_var_mod_data_scaled))$r.squared
summary(lm(growth_resid.sq.mt ~ tri_25,data=growth_var_mod_data_scaled))$r.squared
summary(lm(growth_resid.sq.mt ~ plcv_25,data=growth_var_mod_data_scaled))$r.squared
summary(lm(growth_resid.sq.mt ~ prcv_25,data=growth_var_mod_data_scaled))$r.squared

growth_var_clim_vars <- intersect(all.vars(formula(growth_var_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)
growth_var_mt_vars <- c("prcv_25","tpi_25")

growth_var_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "growth_resid.sq.mt ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + ",
  paste(c(growth_var_clim_vars, growth_var_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(growth_var_clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(growth_var_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
growth_var_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_var_mt_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE)
length(attr(terms(growth_var_mt_mod ), "term.labels"))

clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")
dredge_growth_var_mt <- dredge(growth_var_mt_mod, cluster = clust, #m.lim = c(0,15),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", growth_var_clim_vars), trace = 2)
stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_mt, subset = 1)[[1]]
```

Save all of the models
```{r}

clim2mt_dredge_top10 <- list(
  
  surv_dredge_clim2mt = as.data.frame(dredge_surv_mt) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  growth_dredge_clim2mt = as.data.frame(dredge_growth_mt) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  growth_var_dredge_clim2mt = as.data.frame(dredge_growth_var_mt) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  repro_dredge_clim2mt = as.data.frame(dredge_repro_mt) %>% slice_head(n = 10),
  nflrs_dredge_clim2mt = as.data.frame(dredge_nflrs_mt) %>% slice_head(n = 10)
  
)
saveRDS(clim2mt_dredge_top10,"r/modelFitResults/clim2mt_dredge_top10.RDS")

clim_then_mt_model_list <- list(
  growth_var_clim2mt_best_mod = growth_var_mt_best_mod,
  growth_var_clim2mt_best_mod_data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled ,
  
  surv_clim2mt_best_mod = surv_mt_best_mod,
  growth_clim2mt_best_mod = growth_mt_best_mod,
  repro_clim2mt_best_mod = repro_mt_best_mod,
  nflrs_clim2mt_best_mod = nflrs_mt_best_mod
)
saveRDS(clim_then_mt_model_list,paste0("r/modelFitResults/best_clim2mt_mods_",Sys.Date(),".RDS"))
```
